items.name: Trail Rations
items.blurb: Dried meat, hard bread, a strip of cheese.

items.name: Mana Draught
items.blurb: Blue mist in a crystal phial.

items.name: Smoked Trout
items.blurb: River fish from the Misty Ford.

items.name: Hearth Bread
items.blurb: Still warm from a roadside oven.

items.name: Wild Berry Jam
items.blurb: Sweet enough to forget the road.

items.name: Ember Cider
items.blurb: Warm spiced cider from the Hold.

items.name: Forage Roots
items.blurb: Bitter bulbs that sweeten in stew.

items.name: Stamina Tea
items.blurb: Bitter green brew for long marches.

items.name: Iron Longsword
items.blurb: A hold-forged blade, honest and plain.

items.name: Hunting Bow
items.blurb: Yew and sinew — good for deer and goblins.

items.name: Oak Staff
items.blurb: A traveler's stick that hums at ley lines.

items.name: Bronze Dagger
items.blurb: Short and honest — a rogue's first friend.

items.name: Leather Cap
items.blurb: Keeps rain and glancing blades at bay.

items.name: Hide Jerkin
items.blurb: Soft hide of the northern woods.

items.name: Travel Gloves
items.blurb: Worn leather for rope and bowstring.

items.name: Wool Trousers
items.blurb: Warm enough for Misty Hill roads.

items.name: Round Buckler
items.blurb: A disc of pine banded in iron.

items.name: Elven Longbow
items.blurb: Light as moonbeam, true as oath.

items.name: Mail of Rivendell Roads
items.blurb: Rings that sing when danger nears.

items.name: Amulet of Warding
items.blurb: A soft ward against hex and fang.

items.name: Pack-Leather Cuirass
items.blurb: Soft armor that flexes with the hunt.

items.name: Mist-Strider Greaves
items.blurb: Steps that leave no name for fog to steal.

items.name: Ring of Oaths
items.blurb: Warm when you keep your word.

items.name: Frostward Greatsword
items.blurb: Forged to guard the Frostford pass.

items.name: Swamp Walker Boots
items.blurb: Never sink in bog or mire.

items.name: Ley-Touched Ring
items.blurb: Hums when spells are cast nearby.

items.name: Neverwood Recurve
items.blurb: Bow of living yew, still growing.

items.name: Mire Witch Hood
items.blurb: Smells of peat and old bargains.

items.name: Staff of Ley-Hounds
items.blurb: Arcane wood that hums when hounds howl.

items.name: Plate of the Hearth
items.blurb: Armor that warms allies within a step.

items.name: Sword of the Chronicle
items.blurb: Forged for three names and three hounds.

items.name: Cloak of Fellowship
items.blurb: Three walkers never lose each other's trail.

items.name: Tome of Blessing of Oaths
items.blurb: Read to learn Blessing of Oaths.
